stackRefinements.cli: Node.js >=20 ESM (.mjs) zero-dependency CLI; built-ins only (node:fs, node:test); tests via node --test; ESLint flat-less .eslintrc.json config

ordering: Single layer (cli) with zero internal edges — no provider/consumer ordering exists; every task dispatches directly to the cli layer. internalEdges: [] is a recorded fact, not an omission; deriveDispatchOrder yields the trivial order [cli].
